title: Porto Velho Heat Wave
lead: Porto Velho is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.54. The city has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Porto Velho has brought extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 11.4 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 67%, and the wind speed is 6.3 km/h, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The lack of cooling at night, with an HDD of 0.0 GG, is exacerbating the situation, leading to a critical level of heat stress.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
